output:
usage: dflash_correctness_harness.py [-h] [--config CONFIG]
                                     [--profile PROFILE] [--phase PHASE]
                                     [--tier {quick,full}]
                                     [--target-url TARGET_URL]
                                     [--dflash-url DFLASH_URL]
                                     [--results RESULTS] [--suites SUITES]
                                     [--sampling-count SAMPLING_COUNT]
                                     [--permutations PERMUTATIONS]
                                     [--request-timeout REQUEST_TIMEOUT]
                                     [--resume] [--overwrite]

Numerically tolerant differential harness for target-only and DFlash SGLang.
Greedy cases pass when outputs are exact or when the first differing DFlash
token is within the configured target-oracle logprob delta at the shared
prefix. Finish reasons, lengths, prompts, cache behavior, DFlash activity, and
within-engine repeatability remain exact. Pure helpers are unit-tested without
loading either 32B model.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --config CONFIG
  --profile PROFILE
  --phase PHASE
  --tier {quick,full}
  --target-url TARGET_URL
  --dflash-url DFLASH_URL
  --results RESULTS
  --suites SUITES
  --sampling-count SAMPLING_COUNT
  --permutations PERMUTATIONS
  --request-timeout REQUEST_TIMEOUT
  --resume
  --overwrite
